info.shortName: F/m Compoundr High Yield Bond E
info.longName: F/m Compoundr High Yield Bond ETF

funds_data.description: The index is designed to offer exposure consistent with the total return of high-yield corporate bonds, without receiving and reinvesting dividend income, by investing in ETFs. Under normal market conditions, F/m Investments LLC (the “Adviser”) seeks to achieve the fund’s objective by investing at least 80% of the fund’s net assets (plus any borrowings for investment purposes) in underlying funds that invest primarily in high-yield bonds.
